mapper.select:
WITH G AS ( SELECT DISTINCT s.goods FROM zo_psi.`summary` s JOIN zo_psi.`goods` g ON g.id = s.goods WHERE 1=1
AND s.`time` >= CONCAT(#{query.startTime}, ' 00:00:00')
AND s.`time` <= CONCAT(#{query.endTime}, ' 23:59:59')
AND s.type IN
#{tp}
AND g.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.goods}, '%')
AND s.warehouse IN
#{wid}
),
OPENING AS ( SELECT o.goods, SUM(o.balUct * o.balUns) / NULLIF(SUM(o.balUns),0) AS balUct, SUM(o.balUns) AS balUns, SUM(o.balBct) AS balBct FROM ( SELECT s1.goods, s1.warehouse, CAST(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(s1.balance,'$.uct')) AS DECIMAL(16,4)) AS balUct, CAST(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(s1.balance,'$.uns')) AS DECIMAL(16,4)) AS balUns, CAST(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(s1.balance,'$.bct')) AS DECIMAL(16,4)) AS balBct FROM zo_psi.`summary` s1 JOIN ( SELECT goods, warehouse, MAX(CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(`time`,'%Y%m%d%H%i%s'), id)) AS mkey FROM zo_psi.`summary`
WHERE `time` < CONCAT(#{query.startTime}, ' 00:00:00')
GROUP BY goods, warehouse ) m ON m.goods = s1.goods AND m.warehouse = s1.warehouse AND CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(s1.`time`,'%Y%m%d%H%i%s'), s1.id) = m.mkey ) o GROUP BY o.goods ),
DETAIL AS ( SELECT s.type, CASE WHEN s.type='buy' THEN '采购单' WHEN s.type='bre' THEN '采购退货单' WHEN s.type='sell' THEN '销售单' WHEN s.type='sre' THEN '销售退货单' WHEN s.type='entry' THEN (CASE WHEN en.type=1 THEN '盘盈单' ELSE '其它入库单' END) WHEN s.type='extry' THEN (CASE WHEN ex.type=1 THEN '盘亏单' ELSE '其它出库单' END) WHEN s.type='swapOut' THEN '调拨单-出' WHEN s.type='swapEnter' THEN '调拨单-入' ELSE s.type END AS typeName, s.class AS billId, s.info AS billDetailId, COALESCE(b.number, br.number, se.number, sr.number, en.number, ex.number, sw.number) AS number, s.`time` AS `time`, s.goods AS goodsId, g.name AS goodsName, s.attr AS attr, s.warehouse AS warehouseId, w.name AS warehouseName, s.batch AS batch, s.mfd AS mfd, COALESCE(bi.unit, bri.unit, si.unit, sri.unit, eni.unit, exi.unit, spi.unit, g.unit) AS unit, s.price AS price, CASE WHEN s.direction=1 THEN s.uct END AS inUct, CASE WHEN s.direction=1 THEN s.nums END AS inNums, CASE WHEN s.direction=1 THEN s.bct END AS inBct, CASE WHEN s.direction=0 THEN s.uct END AS outUct, CASE WHEN s.direction=0 THEN s.nums END AS outNums, CASE WHEN s.direction=0 THEN s.bct END AS outBct, CAST(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(s.balance,'$.uct')) AS DECIMAL(16,4)) AS balUct, CAST(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(s.balance,'$.uns')) AS DECIMAL(16,4)) AS balUns, CAST(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(s.balance,'$.bct')) AS DECIMAL(16,4)) AS balBct, COALESCE(b.supplier, en.supplier, br.supplier, NULL) AS partnerId, COALESCE(sup.name, cus.name) AS partnerName, 1 AS ord FROM zo_psi.`summary` s LEFT JOIN zo_psi.`goods` g ON g.id = s.goods LEFT JOIN zo_psi.`warehouse` w ON w.id = s.warehouse LEFT JOIN zo_psi.`buy` b ON s.type='buy' AND b.id = s.class LEFT JOIN zo_psi.`buy_info` bi ON s.type='buy' AND bi.id = s.info LEFT JOIN zo_psi.`bre` br ON s.type='bre' AND br.id = s.class LEFT JOIN zo_psi.`bre_info` bri ON s.type='bre' AND bri.id = s.info LEFT JOIN zo_psi.`sell` se ON s.type='sell' AND se.id = s.class LEFT JOIN zo_psi.`sell_info` si ON s.type='sell' AND si.id = s.info LEFT JOIN zo_psi.`sre` sr ON s.type='sre' AND sr.id = s.class LEFT JOIN zo_psi.`sre_info` sri ON s.type='sre' AND sri.id = s.info LEFT JOIN zo_psi.`entry` en ON s.type='entry' AND en.id = s.class LEFT JOIN zo_psi.`entry_info` eni ON s.type='entry' AND eni.id = s.info LEFT JOIN zo_psi.`extry` ex ON s.type='extry' AND ex.id = s.class LEFT JOIN zo_psi.`extry_info` exi ON s.type='extry' AND exi.id = s.info LEFT JOIN zo_psi.`swap` sw ON (s.type IN ('swapOut','swapEnter') AND sw.id = s.class) LEFT JOIN zo_psi.`swap_info` spi ON (s.type IN ('swapOut','swapEnter') AND spi.id = s.info) LEFT JOIN zo_psi.`supplier` sup ON sup.id = COALESCE(b.supplier, en.supplier, br.supplier) LEFT JOIN zo_psi.`customer` cus ON cus.id = COALESCE(se.customer, sr.customer, ex.customer) WHERE 1=1
AND s.`time` >= CONCAT(#{query.startTime}, ' 00:00:00')
AND s.`time` <= CONCAT(#{query.endTime}, ' 23:59:59')
AND s.type IN
#{tp}
AND g.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.goods}, '%')
AND s.warehouse IN
#{wid}
AND s.goods IN (SELECT goods FROM G) ),
OPENING_ROWS AS ( SELECT 'opening' AS type, '期初余额' AS typeName, NULL AS billId, NULL AS billDetailId, NULL AS number, NULL AS `time`, g.goods AS goodsId, gd.name AS goodsName, NULL AS attr, NULL AS warehouseId, NULL AS warehouseName, NULL AS batch, NULL AS mfd, gd.unit AS unit, NULL AS price, NULL AS inUct, NULL AS inNums, NULL AS inBct, NULL AS outUct, NULL AS outNums, NULL AS outBct, COALESCE(o.balUct,0) AS balUct, COALESCE(o.balUns,0) AS balUns, COALESCE(o.balBct,0) AS balBct, NULL AS partnerId, NULL AS partnerName, 0 AS ord FROM G g LEFT JOIN OPENING o ON o.goods = g.goods LEFT JOIN zo_psi.`goods` gd ON gd.id = g.goods )
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM OPENING_ROWS UNION ALL SELECT * FROM DETAIL ) Z ORDER BY Z.goodsName, Z.ord, Z.`time` IS NULL, Z.`time`, Z.number
